nasb.text: And there appeared to them tongues as of fire distributing themselves, and they rested on each one of them.

esv.text: And divided tongues as of fire appeared to them and rested on each one of them.

cnv.text: 又有火燄般的舌頭顯現出來，分別落在他們各人身上。

ccb.text: 又有火焰般的舌头显现出来，分别落在各人的头上。

csbs.text: 有舌头像火焰那样，向他们显现，分开留在他们每一个人身上。
